script: external schematic (provided as file; not regenerated)
notes: Figure 1 is included as a fixed schematic for the study overview and is not produced by the computational pipeline.
Signed NES shown for discovery; cross-cohort dot matrix uses -log10(FDR) size and direction color.
Panel A shows leave-one-dataset-out (LODO) module score distributions; Panel B shows the LODO forest plot and pooled random-effects estimate.
Single-cell localization is rendered from the included anchor tables under results/.
Shows attenuation under increasingly strict inflammation/EMT proxy adjustment and residual stability across cohorts.
